title: Agent Memory Decay: Theoretical Framework and Empirical Benchmark for Continuous-Time vs Discrete Models in LLM Agent Memory Systems
description: Source code, trained models, and experimental data for the first systematic benchmark of 8 memory decay architectures for LLM agent systems. Evaluates LTC, CfC, Neural ODE, CCT-LNN, GRU, GRU+Time, Transformer, and Parametric ExpDecay across 3 datasets with 5-fold cross-validation.

creators.name: HanBo Wang
creators.affiliation: Department of Computer Science, East China Jiaotong University, Nanchang, China

creators.name: JiaQi Song
